title: Federal Privacy Commissioner says "no" to Street Surveillance Cameras
summary: Yellowknife - Mr. George Radwanski, the federal Privacy Commissioner, in his first decision under the Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), has told a Yellowknife security company that the installation of street surveillance cameras is unlawful. In a letter of decision dated June 15th, 2001, the Privacy Co...
